name: Arugula and Parmigiano-Reggiano Cheese Salad
recipeInstructions:
1. In a small mixing bowl, whisk together the olive oil and balsamic vinegar.
2. Season with salt and pepper.
3. Toss the arugula with the dressing.
4. Lay the prosciutto on a platter.
5. Mound the greens in the center of the prosciutto.
6. Shave the Parmigiano-Reggiano cheese over the greens.
7. Garnish with black pepper.
